mapper.select: SELECT SNS_LOGIN_SEQ , USER_ID , SNS_CD , SNS_ID , LOGIN_DT , LOGIN_CNT , LOGIN_FAIL_CNT , CRET_DT , AMD_DT FROM NMCP_SNS_LOGIN_TXN WHERE SNS_ID = #{snsId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT USERID , PASSWORD , NAME , AUTH_CODE , PIN , EMAIL , POST , ADDRESS , ADDRESS_DTL , MOBILE_NO , CONTACT_NO , BIRTHDAY , GENDER , SYS_RDATE , SYS_UDATE , SYS_LDATE , LOGIN_COUNT , STATUS , CUST_NUM , AUTH_KEY , USER_DIVISION , EMAIL_CODE , ADDRESS_BJD , REVOCATION_DATE , PWD_CHG_DT , MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE , PWD_CHG_DT) AS MON_CNT , NVL(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC(pwd_chg_delay_dt), -1) AS DAY_CNT , LOGIN_FAIL_COUNT , CUSTOMER_ID FROM MCP_USER WHERE USERID = #{userId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE NMCP_SNS_LOGIN_TXN SET AMD_DT = SYSDATE
, LOGIN_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , LOGIN_CNT = NVL(LOGIN_CNT, 0) + 1
, LOGIN_FAIL_CNT = NVL(LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, 0) + 1
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND SNS_ID = #{snsId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
